arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-1,-1,1,1) sprite_index=sScaledCollision image_xscale=-16 image_angle=180 y+=8
//Enemy base statistics atkPower=12 bCanTakeDamage=false bShowHealthBar=false
yCheck=y ySPlace=y extendDist=0 seekSpeed=4 //how fast it comes out seekTime=0 seekMax=12 //how long it will extend waitTime=45 //how long it waits till it retracts and can go back out bTargetFound=false detectDistX=80 detectDistY=192
alarm[0]=1
